project.name: Supir-Vast :: supir-studio
project.description:
A live shader-playground GUI: edit a shader in a text panel, click compile, and see it applied to a 3D model in an OpenGL viewport — instantly. Built on the dasumGUIshi retained-mode UI (sibarum.dasum.gui, OpenGL 3.3 core). The render path is Supir → core (vastir) → SPIR-V (CoreToSpirv) → GLSL (spirv-cross, bundled in vastir-tools) → an OpenGL program, since GL 3.3 can't ingest SPIR-V directly.
Phased: (1) the GUI shell + the live edit→compile→render loop with GLSL in the editor, proving the dasumGUIshi/OpenGL integration; (2) swap the editor input to the Supir S-expression language once the `supir` parser exists, completing Supir→Vastir→SPIR-V→OpenGL.
